title: Caribbean Culture Quiz
description: Learn fun facts about the Caribbean islands!

data.question: What color is a ripe mango?
data.funFact: Mangoes are called the 'King of Fruits' in the Caribbean!

data.question: Which bird can talk and repeat words?
data.funFact: Caribbean parrots are known for their colorful feathers!

data.question: What instrument was invented in Trinidad?
data.funFact: The steel pan is the only instrument invented in the 20th century!

data.question: What does 'Irie' mean?
data.funFact: When Jamaicans say 'Irie', it means everything is wonderful!

data.question: Which sea surrounds the Caribbean islands?
data.funFact: The Caribbean Sea is one of the warmest seas in the world!
